title: Claim
description: A typed assertion ABOUT a content-addressed atom (or another claim), carrying a proof type. A claim is itself serialized and content-addressed, so claims can be about claims.

subject.description: the atom or claim this speaks about

basis.description: grounded → source address/URL; derivable → the recompute expr/fn id; proven → Lean term id; axiom → absent

signer.description: OIDC/keyless identity. Present ONLY when proofType=axiom.

allOf.$comment: SIGN ONLY AXIOMS — an axiom MUST be signed; anything else MUST NOT be. The discipline is a structural constraint, strict-checkable.
Only axioms lack a basis; every derived claim must cite how it is justified.
